description: Static-only promotion with a YELLOW gate: Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 YELLOW (warnings only), behavioral eval not requested (Tier 3 SKIPPED). Final PASS. Covers the (PASS, YELLOW, SKIPPED) corner of the (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, SKIPPED) decision-table row.
why: § 6 R8: YELLOW is in the {GREEN,YELLOW} set and does not block; t3 SKIPPED caps at PASS (§ 9 R16). Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, SKIPPED) -> PASS.
